body.title: Steal Aider repo-map + SEARCH/REPLACE patterns for sprint-ticket
body.result: repo_map.py: stdlib AST symbol map (classes/methods/fns), 14 tests, wired into sprint-ticket SKILL.md step 5; SEARCH/REPLACE already satisfied by Edit tool
body.description:
Aider has two patterns worth copying: (1) repo-map — builds a compact symbol map of the codebase so the LLM gets relevant context without full source, keeping tokens low; (2) SEARCH/REPLACE diff format — more reliable than unified diffs for LLM-generated edits, fewer misapplied hunks. Both improve sprint-ticket success rate and reduce cost. No Aider dependency needed — just the patterns.

**Affected files:** lab/claudecode/sprint_ticket.py (or equivalent sprint runner), new lib/repo_map.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** In scope: repo-map generation (symbol index from AST/grep), SEARCH/REPLACE output format in sprint runner. Out of scope: full Aider integration, any new device or rack component.
**Completion criteria:** (1) Sprint runner builds a repo-map and includes it in context. (2) LLM output uses SEARCH/REPLACE blocks. (3) Edit success rate measurably better on a 5-ticket sample vs baseline.
